close_reason: Implemented workspace inheritance for get_edition. Added find_workspace_root helper and updated gen-rust-buck to pass crate_dir for automatic workspace resolution.
description: The get_edition() function in python/cargo/toml.py doesn't handle edition.workspace = true. When a Cargo.toml uses workspace inheritance (edition.workspace = true), the function should resolve it from the workspace root's [workspace.package] section.
title: Fix get_edition to handle workspace inheritance
